facts.statement: A blue whale can be over 40 meters long
facts.actual: Confirmed up to 29.9–30.5 m; one individual measured at 33 m

facts.statement: A typical blue whale weighs over 50 tonnes
facts.actual: Northern Hemisphere females average 112 tonnes; males average 100 tonnes

facts.statement: A blue whale can engulf over 300 tonnes of water in a single lunge
facts.actual: About 220 tonnes of water per lunge

facts.statement: Blue whales live for over 100 years
Blue whale calls are above 20 Hz in frequency
facts.actual: Blue whale calls range from 8–25 Hz, mostly below human hearing
